exceptions.rationale: The audited baseline already ships this preview. MusFit uses only the Google sign-in retrieval surface, so moving back to stable 1.6.0 is isolated to a dependency-only compatibility PR rather than mixed into governance infrastructure.
exceptions.exitCriteria: Move to the latest stable Credentials release after API 28 and API 37 Google sign-in smoke tests, the Full gate, and the dependency-only startup and size guard pass.

exceptions.rationale: The approved API 37 regression baseline and serialized API 28/37 harness were established on this measurement engine. Changing it can alter Perfetto capture and benchmark semantics, so recalibration belongs in a measured dependency-only PR.
exceptions.exitCriteria: Adopt the 1.5 stable release, or a separately proven stable alternative, after both managed-device matrices pass and the approved performance baseline is deliberately recalibrated.

exceptions.rationale: The Food adaptive remediation requires the Material Navigation 3 list-detail scene integration. AndroidX first aligned adaptive-navigation3 with the adaptive family in 1.3, so the stable 1.2 line does not provide this artifact.
exceptions.exitCriteria: Move to the first stable 1.3 release after compact and expanded Food navigation tests, the Full gate, and the API 28/37 performance matrix pass without regressions.
